text: The Department of Justice upon receiving notice under this chapter that a vessel has been stolen or that a vessel reported stolen has been recovered shall notify the Department of Motor Vehicles of the reported theft or recovery.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 1.5. Reports of Stolen Vessels [10550 - 10554]
##### § 10551.5

The Department of Justice upon receiving notice under this chapter that a vessel has been stolen or that a vessel reported stolen has been recovered shall notify the Department of Motor Vehicles of the reported theft or recovery.

*(Added by Stats. 1980, Ch. 617, Sec. 6.)*

subsections.text: The Department of Justice upon receiving notice under this chapter that a vessel has been stolen or that a vessel reported stolen has been recovered shall notify the Department of Motor Vehicles of the reported theft or recovery.
